name: agience-server-nexus
description: Connects agents, services, and external systems by managing messaging delivery channels, webhooks, request routing, and remote execution.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message via a registered channel adapter

tools.name: get_messages
tools.description: Poll a channel for new messages since a cursor

tools.name: create_webhook
tools.description: Register an inbound webhook and return its endpoint URL

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check health/availability of a service endpoint

tools.name: register_endpoint
tools.description: Register a service endpoint for routing

tools.name: route_request
tools.description: Route a request to a registered endpoint

tools.name: exec_shell
tools.description: Execute a shell command in a sandboxed working directory

tools.name: proxy_tool
tools.description: Proxy an MCP tool call through a registered endpoint

AGIENCE_API_URI.description: Base URI of the agience-core backend

MCP_PORT.description: HTTP port for the MCP server
